reasoning: The control AC-4(31) focuses on enforcing secure information flow, particularly preventing failed content transfers through secure transport mechanisms. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that all network traffic is encrypted and secure. This involves enforcing TLS for ingress traffic, ensuring mTLS in service meshes, and securing API server communications. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce secure traffic flows, while Ingress and Service Mesh configurations ensure TLS and mTLS are enabled.
